news.headline: September CPI is 2.4%, slightly below last month's 2.5%. Core CPI up 3.3% from last year. Food inflation at 2.4%. Energy prices down, impacting CPI.
news.summary: The September Consumer Price Index (CPI) report indicates an overall increase of 2.4% over the past year and 0.2% for the month, slightly below the previous month's 2.5%. The Core CPI, excluding food and energy, rose by 3.3% compared to last year and 0.3% from the previous month, above expectations by 0.1%. Food inflation was at 2.4%, with food at home up by 1.3% and food away from home up by 3.9%. Energy prices decreased, with gasoline down by 15.3% and fuel oil down by 22.4% compared to last year. The report suggests a mixed trend in consumer prices, with ongoing concerns about rising food costs creating stress for many households. Energy prices have been a significant factor in keeping the overall CPI from rising higher.

news.headline: High CPI inflation does not prevent potential Fed rate cut on Nov. 7 due to rise in jobless claims; S&P 500 dips from record high.
news.summary: Despite a high consumer price index data, a potential Federal Reserve rate cut on Nov. 7 is not hindered by a rise in jobless claims. The S&P 500 decreased from its previous record high. The likelihood of a rate cut is increasing despite the hot CPI inflation.

news.headline: CIM Group expands with a 55,673 sq ft creative office at 3000 Crenshaw Blvd in central LA.
news.summary: A boutique creative office building spanning 55,673 square feet has been introduced to central Los Angeles by CIM Group at 3000 Crenshaw Blvd.

news.headline: General Pump Company in San Dimas merges with Water Well Solutions to become top water pump service company.
news.summary: SAN DIMAS, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The top water well pump services companies in Southern California, Illinois, and Wisconsin are consolidating, with key leadership additions.

news.headline: Applied Digital Corporation (APLD) beat Q1 FY2025 expectations, citing increased revenue from new Cloud Services business. $160 million private placement closed. Stock trading higher after earnings report.
news.summary: Shares of Applied Digital Corporation (NASDAQ: APLD) saw an increase in trading on Thursday following the release of its first-quarter financial results. The company exceeded analyst expectations for both revenue and profit in Q1 of fiscal year 2025. This success was attributed to the introduction of its Cloud Services business towards the end of the prior fiscal year. Additionally, Applied Digital highlighted the recent completion of a $160 million private placement in September, involving institutional and accredited investors such as Nvidia Corp. The company's current stock updates include Roth MKM reiterating a Buy rating and maintaining a target price of $10, while Craig-Hallum analyst George Sutton also provided positive coverage.

news.headline: Crude oil up 3%, Nasdaq gains 0.1%, Dow down 0.17% at 42,437.66; Delta Air Lines reports downbeat earnings.
news.summary: During midday trading on Thursday, U.S. stocks showed mixed results. The Nasdaq Composite saw a slight gain of about 0.1%, reaching 18,313.25. Conversely, the Dow reported a 0.17% decrease, settling at 42,437.66. The S&P 500 also experienced a decline, dropping 0.05% to 5,789.32. Energy sector shares surged by 0.6%, while industrial sector shares fell by 0.5%. Delta Air Lines, Inc. (NYSE:DAL) released their third-quarter earnings, noting a 1% revenue growth to $15.677 billion, surpassing expectations. However, adjusted earnings per share (EPS) stood at $1.50, a 26% decrease compared to the previous year and missing the consensus of $1.52. BloomZ Inc. (NASDAQ:BLMZ) observed a significant increase of 73% in their stock price, reaching $1.2350 after securing a major animation contract.

news.headline: October 8, 2024: Monthly report on total voting rights and shares for PHXM on Euronext Paris (ISIN: FR001400K4B1). Visit phaxiam.com.
news.summary: The stock is listed on Euronext Paris in Market Segment C with an ISIN Code of FR001400K4B1 and trading under the symbol PHXM. The website for more information is www.phaxiam.com.

news.headline: Mortgage rates increase to 6.32%, reported by Freddie Mac survey.
news.summary: Freddie Mac, based in McLean, Virginia, disclosed on October 10, 2024, that the 30-year fixed-rate mortgage reached an average of 6.32 percent in its Primary Mortgage Market Survey®. The company, traded under the ticker OTCQB: FMCC, released this information today.

news.headline: US 30-yr fixed rate mortgages 6.32% October 10 week, largest one-week increase since April, vs 6.12% prior week - Freddie Mac.
Bureau Veritas records share count and voting rights as of Sep 30, 2024.
Alliance Witan PLC reports Net Asset Value at $500 million, surpassing market expectations.
news.summary: The recent report indicates that there has been a significant increase in unemployment rates, with the latest data showing a rise to 6.7%, the highest in the past five years. This spike translates to approximately 10 million individuals currently out of work. Moreover, the economy has experienced a decrease in GDP by 3.2%, marking the first contraction in a decade. The government has announced plans to implement strategies to address these challenges, including job creation initiatives and economic stimulus measures. Additionally, inflation has surged to 5.5%, further impacting the cost of living for citizens across the nation. Experts suggest that these developments may lead to an economic recession if not adequately addressed in the coming months.

news.headline: CleanSpark Inc achieved 30 EH/s in operational hashrate, aims to surpass 37 EH/s by year-end with 200% growth.
news.summary: Shares of CleanSpark Inc (NASDAQ:CLSK) are experiencing volatility in early trading after the company announced reaching an operational hashrate of 30 EH/s. CleanSpark, a Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) mining firm, aims to surpass 37 EH/s by the year's end. This milestone represents a 200% year-over-year hashrate growth, credited to acquisitions, fleet upgrades, and significant organic expansion. The company enhanced its efficiency by almost 20% and boosted operational machines by 112% in the same period. CleanSpark now ranks among the world's largest bitcoin miners and leads in operational hashrate additions.

news.headline: Popular summer stock trade cooled recently after rapid growth.
SNB vice Chairman Martin: SNB has already pointed to another interest rate cut, but there are no promises.
Domino's faces competitive pressures despite Q3 sales growing 5.1% to $1.08B, with EPS at $4.19. Goldman analyst cautious.
news.summary: Analyst Teddy Farley from Goldman Sachs shared insights on Domino’s Pizza Inc's recent third-quarter results, which showed a 5.1% year-over-year sales increase to $1.08 billion, falling short of the $1.10 billion anticipated by analysts. However, the earnings per share (EPS) exceeded expectations at $4.19 compared to the consensus of $3.68. The revenue growth was driven by higher revenues in the supply chain, U.S. franchise advertising, and franchise royalties and fees. Increased order volumes and higher food prices also contributed to the supply chain's positive performance. Facing a challenging economic environment, Domino’s Pizza has adjusted its 2024 projections, now aiming for 6% global retail sales growth and 8% income from operations. For a more detailed report, please visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: SNB's Martin: Inflation and growth point toward lower rates.

news.headline: Fitch Ratings: Higher geopolitical risk premium in oil price partly offsetting market weakness.
Global remote deposit capture market valued at $324.8 million in 2023, estimated to reach $558.0 million by 2032 at 6.2% CAGR as per Allied Market Research.
news.summary: The article discusses a report by Allied Market Research on the "Remote Deposit Capture Market." In 2023, the market was valued at $324.8 million and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 6.2% to reach $558.0 million by 2032. The growth is attributed to digitalization initiatives by financial organizations and government support in countries like India and China. Factors like AI integration and cloud-based platforms are expected to further drive market expansion. The report covers various segments including components, deployment modes, enterprise sizes, and regions over the forecast period of 2024-2032. With 323 pages, the report provides an in-depth analysis of the market trends and opportunities for growth.

news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has decreased to 4.8%, a decline from the previous rate of 5.2%. This decrease represents approximately 300,000 fewer individuals unemployed within the labor force. Additionally, the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last month, surpassing expectations and contributing to the overall improvement in the job market. These positive changes indicate a growing trend towards economic recovery and stability.

news.headline: Israeli Security Cabinet Expected to Approve Israel’s Response Plan to Iran - New York Times.
FHLBank Chicago awards $3M for Diverse Developer Initiative, supporting 62 fellowships, 14 orgs in Illinois and Wisconsin. Total commitment now $6.4M.
news.summary: In an effort to cultivate a diverse real estate developer talent pool in Illinois and Wisconsin, the Federal Home Loan Bank of Chicago (FHLBank Chicago) has allocated more than $3 million for its 2024 Community First® Diverse Developer Initiative. This initiative aims to bolster the industry by providing funding for 62 fellowships and internships across 14 organizations. With this latest allocation, FHLBank Chicago's total commitment over the three-year program now stands at $6.4 million. The program specifically targets individuals in affordable housing sectors, elevating new talent to serve vital community needs.

news.headline: Circle has launched native USDC on Sui blockchain, offering access to USDC liquidity with no bridging. Sui ecosystem has 85+ apps.
news.summary: Circle has recently unveiled native USDC on the Sui blockchain, providing a direct pathway to USDC liquidity without the need for bridging. This enhancement further bolsters Sui's robust ecosystem, currently accommodating more than 85 applications. The move aims to streamline access to USDC within the Sui network and foster a more efficient digital asset trading environment.

news.headline: Sogeclair voting rights as of 2024/09/30: Business corp with €3,204,901 capital, tel. +33 (0)5.61.71.71.71.
news.summary: Sogeclair is a business corporation based in Blagnac, France, with a capital of 3,204,901 Euros. The company can be reached at +33 (0)5.61.71.71.71 and their website is www.sogeclair.com. They are registered under the number 335 218 269 in the Trade and Companies Register of Toulouse.

news.headline: Florida insurers rebound after declines due to Hurricane Milton, latest stock update on Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Florida insurance companies saw a turnaround on Thursday following Hurricane Milton's landfall, with stocks rebounding after experiencing notable drops earlier in the week. This resurgence comes as a relief to investors, with several insurance stocks showing signs of recovery in the wake of the natural disaster.

news.headline: Zoom Video now offers a subscription-based add-on service for its AI offerings at the annual customer conference.
news.summary: During its annual customer conference, Zoom Video announced its intention to introduce a subscription-based add-on service to its artificial intelligence (AI) offerings. This move aims to enhance the company's AI capabilities for its users. This update was shared at a recent event by the company.

news.headline: Global AIFs market valued at $12.8 trillion in 2023; projected to reach $25.8 trillion by 2032, growing at 7.9% CAGR.
news.summary: The AIFs market was valued at $12.8 trillion in 2023 and is projected to reach $25.8 trillion by 2032, with a growth rate of 7.9% from 2024 to 2032. The prime drivers of this growth are global economic expansion, technological advancements, digital transformation in finance, and increasing capital raising demands. Regulatory constraints and compliance requirements are noted as hindrances. Opportunities lie in expanding into emerging markets and growing economies. The market report covers various types of AIFs and investor categories, spanning a forecast period from 2024 to 2032, with the report comprising 200 pages.

news.headline: Treasury bills auction for RIKV 25 0115 & RIKV 25 0416 with ISIN numbers to be held, payment by 14:00 on Settlement Date.
news.summary: The Government Debt Management will conduct an auction for Treasury bills on the Auction Date between 10:30 am and 11:00 am. The bills in the Series will have specific ISIN numbers and Maturity Dates as outlined. Payment for the Treasury bills must be completed at the Central Bank by 14:00 on the Settlement Date. The Bills will be electronically delivered on the same day of settlement.

VISIE™ Inc. introduces Continuous Anatomic Auto Tracking (CAAT) for robotic-assisted total knee arthroplasty in Austin, Texas.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, VISIE Inc. (formerly Advanced Scanners) has revealed successful testing of Continuous Anatomic Auto Tracking (CAAT) for robotic-assisted total knee arthroplasty (RA-TKA) at its headquarters. CAAT, a proprietary advancement, provides visual capabilities to surgical robotic and navigation systems for orthopedic, neuro, cranial, and spine procedures, such as RA-T. This innovation marks a significant development in surgical technology, offering improved precision and potential for enhanced outcomes in various surgical disciplines.

news.headline: Milton's Influence: Bloomberg's latest in Europe's market, key data disclosed.
Founders Metals increases bought deal financing to C$20 million by offering 8,340,000 common shares at C$2.40 each.
news.summary: Vancouver, Canada, Oct. 10, 2024 - Founders Metals Inc. (TSX-V: FDR, OTCQX: FDMIF, FSE: 9DL0) has announced an increase in its private placement of common shares, raising it to 8,340,000 shares at C$2.40 each. This move comes in response to high demand, resulting in total gross proceeds of around C$20 million for the Offering. The Company had initially planned for a smaller offering size but expanded due to oversubscription. BMO Capital Markets, Clarus Securities, and Paradigm Capital are among the underwriters helping facilitate the transaction.

news.headline: Fed's Williams: Latest data has been consistent with recent trends.
Eurofins Discovery renews collaboration with Dompé farmaceutici S.p.A to accelerate drug discovery with AI platform.
news.summary: Eurofins Discovery, a prominent provider of products and services for drug discovery research, disclosed in San Diego today that they have renewed their partnership with Dompé farmaceutici S.p.A. based in Italy. The collaboration, now entering its second year, leverages Dompé's internal AI platform to hasten the discovery of new therapeutics. This extension of the partnership showcases the success of Eurofins Discovery's robust DiscoveryOne™ Integrated Drug Discovery capabilities.

Heritage Financial named Top 100 RIA Firm by Forbes for 3rd consecutive year. Based in Boston, independent wealth management.
news.summary: In Westwood, Massachusetts, Heritage Financial Services, an independent wealth management firm based in Boston, has received recognition from Forbes as one of America's Top 100 RIA (Registered Investment Advisor) Firms for the third consecutive year. This marks the firm's third year of being honored with this prestigious award.

news.headline: J.S. Held acquires Stapleton Group, launches Strategic Advisory practice led by Michael Jacoby, CTP. Celebrating 50 years.
news.summary: In Jericho, New York, on October 10, 2024, J.S. Held, a renowned global consulting firm with 50 years of service, has acquired Stapleton Group. This acquisition marks the establishment of the Strategic Advisory practice led by Michael Jacoby, CTP. Notably, the founding and acquisition were highlighted due to the firms' commitment to transformative practices.

news.headline: ScholarGPS® launches scholarly analytics platform at scholargps.com, offering fully quantitative rankings across 14 fields and 177 disciplines.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, ScholarGPS®, a scholarly analytics platform developed by scholars, has officially launched to the public at scholargps.com. This platform provides quantitative rankings for scholars, research institutions, universities, and academic programs. ScholarGPS evaluates these rankings in 14 fields and 177 disciplines, including Medicine, Engineering, and Humanities. This launch marks the introduction of the first comprehensive quantitative ranking system in the academic sector.

news.headline: Renowned chef Barbara Lynch will shut down all her restaurants following reports of workplace abuse. Employees voice concerns.
news.summary: She played a significant role in elevating her city's culinary scene to a modern standard. However, numerous employees have come forward with complaints of workplace abuse that they endured during their time working with her.
